prompt: Looking at the C shell repo at /home/mcs/Documents/git/mcshell — which modules feel like they're doing too much and tangling the rest of the codebase? Trying to figure out what to break apart.

assertions.text: Skill triggers from implicit phrasing ('doing too much', 'tangling') without the word 'hotspot'
Recognizes the repo is QML, not C
Either recommends adding QML support to the analyzer OR delivers analysis despite the gap
Identifies a real refactor target (StatusBar.qml, Launcher, or similar god component)
